lines.text: I would like to open a bank account.
Certainly. Do you have your identification with you?
Yes, here is my passport.
Thank you. Please fill out this form.
lines.fullTranslation: Teşekkür ederim. Lütfen bu formu doldurun.

lines.text: My bank card is not working.
When did the problem start?
Yesterday evening.
We can issue a new card for you.
I would like to withdraw some cash.
How much would you like to withdraw?
Two hundred euros, please.
Please enter your PIN code.
I need to transfer money internationally.
Which country are you sending it to?
To Turkey.
Please provide the IBAN number.
Could you check my account balance?
Of course. One moment, please.
Your current balance is one thousand euros.
Thank you for your help.
I cannot access my online banking account.
Did you forget your password?
Yes, I think so.
We can reset it for you.
I would like information about personal loans.
How much would you like to borrow?
Around ten thousand euros.
We offer several options with different interest rates.
lines.fullTranslation: Farklı faiz oranları ile birkaç seçenek sunuyoruz.

lines.text: I need to update my address.
Do you have proof of your new address?
Yes, here is my rental contract.
Thank you. We will update it immediately.
I would like to apply for a credit card.
Do you currently have a bank account with us?
lines.fullTranslation: Şu anda bizimle bir banka hesabınız var mı?

lines.text: Yes, I opened one last year.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, geçen yıl bir tane açtım.

lines.text: Great. We just need a few more details.
lines.fullTranslation: Harika. Sadece birkaç ayrıntıya daha ihtiyacımız var.

lines.text: The ATM kept my card.
Did the machine show an error message?
lines.fullTranslation: Makine bir hata mesajı gösterdi mi?

lines.text: Yes, but I could not understand it.
We will block the card and order a new one.
lines.fullTranslation: Kartı bloke edeceğiz ve yeni bir tane sipariş edeceğiz.

lines.text: I am interested in opening a savings account.
Would you like a flexible or fixed account?
lines.fullTranslation: Esnek mi yoksa sabit bir hesap mı istersiniz?

lines.text: What is the difference between them?
A fixed account usually offers higher interest rates.
lines.fullTranslation: Sabit bir hesap genellikle daha yüksek faiz oranları sunar.

lines.text: Could I schedule an appointment with a financial advisor?
lines.fullTranslation: Bir finans danışmanı ile randevu planlayabilir miyim?

lines.text: Certainly. What day would work best for you?
lines.fullTranslation: Tabii ki. Hangi gün sizin için en iyi olur?

lines.text: Friday morning would be ideal.
You are scheduled for ten thirty on Friday.
lines.fullTranslation: Cuma günü saat on otuz için planlandınız.
